rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees involving visible ports, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes; avoid package-qualified names not present in the model.
generic_rules: Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence with pre() and step().
Branching logic in AGREE should use nested if-then-else expressions.
AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq for equation declarations, const for constants, assume/guarantee for assertions, and assign for implementation bindings.
AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool; avoid AADL property names as variables.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level guarantees or subcomponent references in component type annexes.
Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens (ms, Hz) as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
